description: Quadruple FET Bus Switch 2.5-V/3.3-V Low-Voltage, High-Bandwidth Bus Switch

EP.description: Exposed thermal pad, typically connected to GND

layout_hints.hint: The 0.1-µF capacitor must be placed as close as possible to the SN74CB3Q3257 device.

topology_hints.hint: Information in the following applications sections is not part of the TI component
The application shown in Figure 5 is a 4-bit bus being controlled. The OE pins are used to control the chip from
the bus controller. This is a very generic example and can apply to many situations. If an application requires
Figure 5. Typical Application of the SN74CB3Q3257
